content.json:
# Inter-Region Egress — Overview
**Theme:** Egress monitoring between Azure regions · **Data source:** `AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL` (Traffic Analytics on NSG flow logs).

Cross-region traffic volume, top region pairs, and outbound flow breakdown.

> Requires Traffic Analytics enabled. `_CL` column names (`Src1_Region_s`, `Dest_Region_s`, `FlowDirection_s`, `OutboundBytes_d`) are connector-dependent — verify in your workspace.

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and isnotempty(Src1_Region_s) and isnotempty(Dest_Region_s) and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by Src1_Region_s, Dest_Region_s | sort by Bytes desc
content.title: Cross-region bytes by source → destination region

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: Cross-region egress bytes over time

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by RegionPair=strcat(Src1_Region_s, ' -> ', Dest_Region_s) | top 15 by Bytes desc | render barchart
content.title: Top cross-region pairs by egress

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d), Flows=count() by FlowDirection_s | sort by Bytes desc
content.title: Flow direction breakdown (O = outbound)
